title: Find inject secret config and fix validation

log.context: Find inject secret config and fix validation

Both return 401 as expected. The fix is complete.

Summary of findings and changes:

**Root cause:** `/mnt/data/inject/src/index.ts` had no secret validation at all — it accepted any POST to `/inject` regardless of what `x-inject-secret` header was provided. The integration test `test_inject_rejects_bad_secret` posts with `"not-the-real-secret"` and expects 401, but was getting 200.

**What was found:**
- The expected secret is `DISCORD_INJECT_SECRET` in `/home/clungus/.claude/channels/discord/....(truncated)
